vulnerabilities.name: Weak TLS Protocol - TLSv1.0
vulnerabilities.evidence: TLSv1.0 connection succeeded
vulnerabilities.remediation: Disable TLSv1.0 on server. Use TLS 1.2 or TLS 1.3.

vulnerabilities.name: Weak TLS Protocol - TLSv1.1
vulnerabilities.evidence: TLSv1.1 connection succeeded
vulnerabilities.remediation: Disable TLSv1.1 on server. Use TLS 1.2 or TLS 1.3.

vulnerabilities.name: Cookie Security - SameSite=None
vulnerabilities.description: Cookie '__cf_bm': Cookie sent on cross-site requests
vulnerabilities.evidence: Cookie flags: httponly, samesite=none, secure, path=/, domain=kimi.com, expires=sat, 30 may 2026 18:57:53 gmt
vulnerabilities.remediation: Set the missing flag on cookie '__cf_bm'.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing CSP Header
vulnerabilities.description: Content-Security-Policy header is missing. Site is vulnerable to XSS attacks.
vulnerabilities.evidence: CSP header not present in response
vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement Content-Security-Policy header with appropriate directives.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing X-Frame-Options Header
vulnerabilities.description: X-Frame-Options header is missing. Site is vulnerable to clickjacking attacks.
vulnerabilities.evidence: X-Frame-Options header not present
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add 'X-Frame-Options: DENY' or 'X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN' header.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing X-XSS-Protection Header
vulnerabilities.evidence: X-XSS-Protection header not present
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add 'X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block' header.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing X-Content-Type-Options Header
vulnerabilities.description: X-Content-Type-Options header is missing. Site is vulnerable to MIME-type sniffing attacks.
vulnerabilities.evidence: X-Content-Type-Options header not present
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add 'X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff' header.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Referrer-Policy Header
vulnerabilities.description: Referrer-Policy header is missing. Referrer information may leak.
vulnerabilities.evidence: Referrer-Policy header not present
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add 'Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin' or similar.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Permissions-Policy Header
vulnerabilities.description: Permissions-Policy header is missing. Browser features are uncontrolled.
vulnerabilities.evidence: Permissions-Policy header not present
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add Permissions-Policy header to restrict browser features.

vulnerabilities.name: Server Information Disclosure
vulnerabilities.evidence: Server: cloudflare
vulnerabilities.remediation: Hide or obfuscate server version in headers. Use generic server names.

vulnerabilities.name: Technology Disclosure - x-powered-by
vulnerabilities.evidence: x-powered-by: Express
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove or obfuscate technology-specific headers.

vulnerabilities.name: Error Page Information Disclosure
vulnerabilities.description: Custom error page or information leak on /nonexistent-page-test-12345
vulnerabilities.evidence: Path: /nonexistent-page-test-12345, Status: 200, Errors: 1
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use custom error pages. Disable detailed error messages in production.

vulnerabilities.name: Sensitive Data Exposure - Phone Number
vulnerabilities.description: Sensitive data (Phone Number) exposed in web page content
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove sensitive data from client-side code. Use environment variables. Implement proper secrets management.

vulnerabilities.name: Sensitive Data Exposure - x-powered-by Header
vulnerabilities.evidence: Header: x-powered-by: Express
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove or obfuscate server version headers.

vulnerabilities.name: Sensitive Data Exposure - server Header
vulnerabilities.evidence: Header: server: cloudflare
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove or obfuscate server version headers.

vulnerabilities.name: Sensitive Endpoint Exposed - /.env
vulnerabilities.evidence: Endpoint accessible, contains sensitive-looking data (53554 bytes)
vulnerabilities.remediation: Restrict access to /.env. Remove from production or add authentication.
